text:
MUSDYS_MEDICAID_EVER Muscular Dystrophy - Medicaid Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 MUSDYS_MEDICARE_EVER Muscular Dystrophy - Medicare Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 SPIBIF_COMBINED Spina Bifida and Other Congenital Anomalies of the Nervous System - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
 SPIBIF_MEDICAID Spina Bifida and Other Congenital Anomalies
